overall.description: Static establishing shot of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game (likely Hogwarts Legacy), showing students dining at long house tables beneath thousands of floating candles in a vast gothic stone hall. The camera remains fixed at the entrance looking toward the faculty table at the far end, capturing the warm candlelit atmosphere and medieval architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining chamber with floating candle chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary at the hall entrance, observing the dining students and grand architecture from a fixed vantage point

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static establishing shot of the Great Hall, a vast gothic dining chamber illuminated by thousands of floating candles overhead. Long wooden house tables line both sides of a central marble aisle, filled with students dining and conversing, while tall stone pillars and arched windows frame the space. The warm candlelight creates a magical atmosphere as the view extends toward the faculty table at the distant end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, sweeping view of a vast gothic dining chamber that maintains a consistent atmosphere of magical warmth. It begins by capturing the immense scale of the Great Hall, where thousands of floating candles cast a soft glow over the entire space. The perspective extends down a central marble aisle, flanked by long wooden house tables crowded with conversing students. This view is framed by towering stone pillars and arched windows, which guide the eye deeper into the architecture. The scene finally settles on the distant faculty table at the far end of the hall, anchoring the composition within the grand, candlelit environment.
